texto: It's difficult for a young girl like me. Because there's a certain time for young actresses, which is like a really juicy period when all the parts are love interests and young heroines. Of course, there's always work for men whatever age they are.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gemma Arterton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “It's difficult for a young girl like me. Because there's a certain time for young actresses, whic…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, work pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e work.

frase_original: It's difficult for a young girl like me. Because there's a certain time for young actresses, which is like a really juicy period when all the parts are love interests and young heroines. Of course, there's always work for men whatever age they are.

texto: My mother, she had a very good attitude toward money. I'm very grateful for the fact that we had to learn to save. I used to get like 50 pence a week, and I'd save it for like five months. And then I'd spend it on Christmas presents. I'd save up like eight pounds. It's nothing, but we did that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gemma Arterton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “My mother, she had a very good attitude toward money. I'm very grateful for the fact that we had …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, money, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de natal e termino.

frase_original: My mother, she had a very good attitude toward money. I'm very grateful for the fact that we had to learn to save. I used to get like 50 pence a week, and I'd save it for like five months. And then I'd spend it on Christmas presents. I'd save up like eight pounds. It's nothing, but we did that.
